query:
SELECT 
  ro.id as orId, ro.orderNumber, ro.status,
  roi.expectedQuantity, roi.receivedQuantity,
  p.sku, p.description, p.unitsPerBox
FROM receivingOrderItems roi
JOIN receivingOrders ro ON ro.id = roi.receivingOrderId
JOIN products p ON p.id = roi.productId
WHERE roi.productId = 30008
ORDER BY roi.id DESC
LIMIT 5;
